title: Healthy Cuban-Style Picadillo
ingredients: 1 lb lean ground turkey (or 93% lean ground beef)
1/4 cup dry white wine or low-sodium broth
Salt and black pepper, to taste
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and bell pepper, cooking until softened, about 4-5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add ground turkey, breaking it up with a spoon, and cook until browned, about 6-8 minutes.
Stir in tomato sauce, wine or broth, olives, raisins, capers, cumin, oregano, and bay leaf.
Season with salt and pepper, then reduce heat to low and simmer uncovered for 15-20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until slightly thickened.
